title: Interactive AI Lesson Plan for a 14-Year-Old Student
description: Built an interactive AI-powered lesson plan web app for a 14-year-old student after Manus failed due to git/sandbox issues. Included subject selection, goal setting, and tutor style configuration.

title: Investor Portal — GitHub Pages Deployment
description: Built and deployed an investor portal tracking Metro Atlanta real estate properties and investors. Dark left sidebar layout, navy #1a2332, tab-based Properties/Investors list view. Deployed to brandonrose2.github.io/investor-portal via GitHub Contents API.

title: Barcode & QR Code Inventory Web App
description: Built a full barcode and QR code inventory scanner app using Robert's Peptides as demo company. Six pages: Dashboard, Scan, Inventory, Receipts, Labels (QR Builder), History. Live camera scanning via Quagga.js, CSV import/export, localStorage persistence, configurable Settings tab.

title: Manus Task Portal — GitHub-Linked with Live Sync
description: Built a self-contained 635-task Manus archive portal with dark amber/slate theme, sidebar filters, grid/list views, activity chart, and detail panels. Then extended with GitHub Actions auto-rebuild workflow (build_portal.py) and live fetch from GitHub raw.

title: Referral Flyer Generator — Node.js + Google Cloud Run
description: Built a property referral flyer generator web app with navy/green design, Anton/Pacifico fonts, ApartmentCorp diamond logo. Node.js/Express server at localhost:3737 serving property photos from COYAPTCORP shared network drive. Final architecture uses Google Cloud Run with service account for Drive photo access.

title: Better Notes — Evernote Clone with Exchange Email
description: Built a full Evernote clone 'Better Notes' with warm dark brown theme (#17130f), gold accents, rich text editor, notebooks, tags, pinned notes, reminders, full-text search, Claude AI assistant panel. Added Exchange email integration via IMAP/SMTP to mail.aptrents.com using ara\Brandon credentials on Node.js port 3738.

title: CEO Executive Reporting Dashboard
description: Built a comprehensive CEO reporting dashboard replicating the PropertyMax FLOW tab financial structure. 8 navigation tabs: Overview, Payment Flow, Vacancy, Manager KPIs, Financials, Maintenance, Delinquency, Renewals. Covers 6 Reg 1 properties with full rent collection, NOI, valuations, cap rates. Uses Claude API for AI-generated executive briefings.

title: Forms & Resources Portal — PDF Export
description: Built a unified Forms & Resources portal with 6 form types: HQS Fail Inspection Checklist, Make Ready Checklist, Pre-Move-Out Inspection, Move-Out Charge List, Maintenance Work Order, Incident Report. Each form has Export Blank PDF and Export Filled PDF. Auto-saves to localStorage with Saved badge.

title: Daily Regional Collections & Vacancy Email Reporter
description: Built a daily regional reporting system using Puppeteer scraping PropertyMax.ai across all 4 regions. Sends formatted HTML emails to JR Rolon, Leslie Rolon, Ginger Positerry, Blake Weddington via Exchange (RegionalReporting@ApartmentCorp.com). Includes mobile-first email design and HTML attachment with full desktop report.

title: Website Audit — Dean Parker Design
description: Comprehensive SEO and UX audit for deanparkerdesign.com (Squarespace interior design portfolio). Identified critical SEO gaps, missing meta descriptions, no location targeting, weak conversion paths. Produced professional PDF report with scored findings, color-coded badge cards, and 10-item action plan.

title: IntelliFiles — AI Document Management System
description: Built IntelliFiles document management system using Google Apps Script. Claude API categorizes uploads into 20 Google Drive folders (Legal, Finance, Maintenance, HR, Tenant Relations, etc.). Includes drag-and-drop UI, Gmail auto-ingestion from marcmenowitznotes@gmail.com, Google Sheet index, and keyword search.

title: Indeed Applicant Ranker — Excel Workbook with M365 Checkboxes
description: Built a ranked Excel workbook from Indeed CSV exports covering 1,644 applicants across 12 job titles. Native M365 checkboxes via XLSX ZIP/XML manipulation (openpyxl + lxml). Includes indeed_weekly_ranker.py automation script and setup_task_scheduler.bat for Monday 8AM refresh.

title: ApartmentCorp AI & ClickUp Infrastructure Plan
description: Comprehensive AI/ClickUp infrastructure planning session. Designed full ClickUp workspace: 6 functional spaces + 5 regional spaces. Mapped PropertyMax 2.0 integration ecosystem (13 apps). Defined two-layer AI strategy: PropertyMax AI Bot for property-level, Claude for portfolio intelligence. Produced 12-slide executive PowerPoint.

title: Vacancy Report App — Self-Contained HTML Replica
description: Replicated the ApartmentCorp vacancy report app from Manus as a self-contained HTML file. PIN-protected admin panel (3060), five stat cards, scrolling ticker, at-risk properties, unit detail tabs (Vacant/Unleased, Preleased, On Notice, Evictions). Baked live PropertyMax data directly into HTML constants.

title: PropertyMax KPI Scraper — Google Apps Script + Puppeteer
description: Reverse-engineered PropertyMax.ai ColdFusion API. Built Google Apps Script collecting 13 KPIs per manager (Guest Cards, Call Recordings, Tasks) into Google Sheets. Discovered session-based auth requires local Node.js/Puppeteer server at C:\pmx-api\ with manager-switching via dashboard dropdown.

title: PropertyMax Daily KPI Collection — Token Estimation
description: Reverse-engineered PropertyMax.ai API endpoints for automated KPI collection across 30-35 managers. Discovered CFC endpoints, session cookie auth patterns, call recording tab IDs (negcalls, marketingcalls, urgcalls), and guest card getGuestCards POST parameters. Built 5 iterations of Google Apps Script.
output: Google Apps Script v5 + endpoint documentation

title: ApartmentCorp Website — Vercel Deployment
description: Deployed ApartmentCorp website (Vite/React app) from github.com/AptCorp-PropertyMax/apartmentcorp-website to Vercel. Resolved Windows UNC path issues, npm peer dependency conflicts (--legacy-peer-deps), PowerShell execution policy. Root directory: client, output: ../dist/public.

title: Manus Connector Demo — Performance Management Workflow
description: Designed an 8-step Manus workflow demonstration for leadership showcasing AI automation across Notion, Exchange Email, spreadsheets, and Calendar connectors. Targets underperforming managers with coaching communications. Prepared as executive demo for Marc.

title: Compound Interest Explainer — Interactive Visualization
description: Built an interactive compound interest explorer with sliders for principal, rate, and time. Line chart comparing compound vs. simple interest. Includes Rule of 72 explanation.

title: Office Improvements & Pest Control Proposal
description: Rewrote a property visit memo to Marc covering lobby furniture upgrades, gravel area improvements, and a case for switching pest control vendors based on tenant complaints observed during a one-hour site visit.

title: Evernote Export — Open & View Notes
description: Helped open and view boss's exported Evernote .enex files with attachments. Recommended Joplin as fastest free option for viewing all notes and attachments without re-importing to Evernote.
